summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The YieldMax JP Option Income Strategy ETF (JPO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the JPMorgan Chase & Co. stock (JPM) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys JPO was launched on Sep 11, 2023 and is issued by YieldMax.
